entity.label: Eliel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the overseers of the offerings in the reign of Hezekiah (2 Chr. 31:13).

nodes.label: Eliel
nodes.description: One of the overseers of the offerings in the reign of Hezekiah (2 Chr. 31:13).

verses.text: And Jehiel, and Azaziah, and Nahath, and Asahel, and Jerimoth, and Jozabad, and Eliel, and Ismachiah, and Mahath, and Benaiah, were overseers under the hand of Cononiah and Shimei his brother, at the commandment of Hezekiah the king, and Azariah the ruler of the house of God.
